title: Any Other Way: The Jackie Shane Story
original_title: Any Other Way: The Jackie Shane Story
overview: Any Other Way: The Jackie Shane Story reveals the extraordinary rise, sudden disappearance, and resurgence of trailblazing Black trans soul singer Jackie Shane.
